rows.requirement: MS Project-like dual-pane Gantt layout with compact ribbon, view switcher, formula bar, timeline, sliding right management panel, and status bar.
rows.cleanup: Mock state is browser-local only; verification clears localStorage before main scenario.

rows.requirement: Excel-like grid supports cell selection, address/formula bar, F2 editing, typing, Enter apply, undo/redo, blank row creation, Insert/Delete, column hide/show, and column resize.
rows.cleanup: Undo stack and localStorage are reset at the start of verification.

rows.requirement: Scheduling mock reflects MS Project work-duration-units behavior, task types, predecessor validation, summary rollup, milestone, critical path, and recalculation feedback.
rows.cleanup: No persisted production data; only mock task array and localStorage.

rows.requirement: Gantt timeline is interactive: hide/show, splitter, baseline mode, dependency lines, status date, critical bars, and bar drag handler.
rows.cleanup: Verification reloads the mock before the drag-handler check.

rows.requirement: Resource conflict workspace includes conflict list, load heatmap, selected conflict signal, recommended action, dry-run preview, apply result, audit, readback, and return-to-Gantt update.
rows.cleanup: Applied state is mock-local and resettable through localStorage clearing.

rows.requirement: KISS PM management contour is built into the planning surface: signal -> recommended action -> dry-run preview -> apply -> audit/readback -> refreshed projection.
rows.cleanup: Verification proves preview is non-mutating and apply changes mock readback state.

rows.requirement: Sliding right panel is non-blocking and can collapse/open without losing planning context.
rows.cleanup: Panel state is DOM-only in the mock session.

rows.requirement: Visual quality is a cohesive professional planning tool: restrained palette, consistent spacing/radius, dense operational layout, no marketing composition, Russian UI.
Narrow viewport keeps the primary planning surface usable without incoherent overlap.
Browser verification has no console errors and produces machine-readable interaction evidence.
rows.cleanup: Console log and verification JSON are stored under docs/design-mockups/artifacts/project-gantt-v5.
